$comment: Hand-authored OpenAPI metadata merged INTO the generated spec by scripts/ops/generate-openapi.mjs. The generator enumerates every src/app/api/**/route.ts (path + real HTTP methods) automatically; this file only enriches operations worth documenting and supplies the static `info`/`servers` blocks. Operation keys are `METHOD /api/path` (uppercase method) and MUST match a real generated operation (the generator errors on an orphan key). Routes not listed here get a derived default summary + a generic 200 response. NEVER invent response schemas you have not verified against the route handler — sparse-but-accurate beats detailed-but-wrong.

info.title: Changemappers API
info.description: Internal and public HTTP API for the Changemappers platform. This spec is generated from the route handlers under src/app/api — run `npm run openapi:generate` after adding or changing a route.

GET /api/health.description: Returns the application's liveness/readiness, including a database connectivity probe.

503.description: Service unhealthy (e.g. database disconnected) — body { status: "error" }

GET /api/gdpr/export.description: Returns the full GDPR data export for the authenticated user as a JSON download. Rate-limited to at most twice per day.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded (max twice per day)
